v8:item.v8:content: Терминал, по данным которого рассчитывается выработка
The terminal, according to which the output is calculated
Объект мониторинга, по данным которого рассчитывается выработка
The monitoring object, according to the data of which the production is calculated
Volume of fuel filled at the beginning
Volume of fuel filled at the end
Link to the "Production Parameters" reference book
Длительность времени состояния объекта мониторинга в секундах
The duration of the monitoring object's state in seconds
Average speed of the monitored object
Maximum speed of the monitoring object
Parking location of the monitoring object
Time of recording of driving violation
Link to the reference book "Criteria of Violation"
Link to the reference book "Conditions of Violation"
Link to the reference book "Criteria of Violation"
Link to the reference book "Conditions of Violation"
The amount of the fine for the violation
Latitude of the onset of the violation
Duration of the onset of the violation
Latitude of the end of the violation
Duration of the end of the violation
Location of the onset of the violation
Location of the end of the violation
Beginning of the associated motion interval
End of the associated interval of movement
Длительность времени состояния объекта мониторинга в секундах
The duration of the monitoring object's state in seconds
